title: November 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 13''' is the 317th day of the year (318th in leap years), with 48 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 92|''Star Wars'' 92]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' released.
*[[2002]] – [[Empire 3|''Empire'' 3]] published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 46]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 5]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2009]] – "[[Weapons Factory]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars and History]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Annihilation]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 11|''Star Wars'' (2013) 11]] published.
*[[2017]] – "[[Rebel Assault]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – [[Target Vader 5|''Target Vader'' 5]] published.
*2019 – [[Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple 4|''Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple'' 4]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 74|''Star Wars'' (2015) 74]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Chapter 11: The Heiress]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – ''[[Republic, Rebel, and Resistance Starfighters]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – [[Ewoks (2024) 2|''Ewoks'' (2024) 2]] published.
